hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then git fetch origin master --quiet 2>/dev/null; behind=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/master 2>/dev/null); behind=${behind:-0}; if [ "$behind" -gt 0 ]; then jq -n --arg b "$behind" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:("Branch is behind origin/master by " + $b + " commit(s). Rebase onto latest master first: git fetch origin master && git rebase origin/master, resolve any conflicts, verify build/tests, then retry gh pr create.")}}'; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking branch is rebased on latest master...

hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"PR created → run /yourssh-roadmap, update README + CLAUDE.md, bump version in app/pubspec.yaml","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PR to master created. Before merging, you MUST: 1) run /yourssh-roadmap to update docs/roadmap.md, 2) update README.md with newly shipped features, 3) update CLAUDE.md architecture/service descriptions, 4) bump version in app/pubspec.yaml. Commit all changes to the PR branch so they are included in the PR."}}'; fi
